transcript: Uhhhh. Yeah, this is Coyote callin'.
Yeah, you may have heard of me. I play frickin' badminton, bud. Electronic badminton. You may've heard of my band, Mechanical Bullshit, bud.
With a picture of you in the bunny suit...
...at the Grizzly Rose, riding the bull.
[laughing] Oh, god. [clears throat] Bunny suit? What, did you see that fuckin' thing?
You never showed it to me.
No, actually, uh... you told me about it, we were just talking about it the other day. At the shop, I thought about it.
